title: pavonia glabra
intro: Pavonia glabra, also known as smooth rose mallow, is a perennial plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia glabra include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from wounds and skin irritations. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
